x-enumeration-literals.name: Requirements Definition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
To meet Coverage Planning Goals set by Management
*Research Insights – prevailing customer demographics, psychographics, behaviors, needs and preferences by product and service
*Applicable Goals – i.e. brand, sales, leads, behaviors, etc.
*Target Segments – by demographics, behavior, engagement history etc.
*Persona Definition – one or more to be targeted

x-enumeration-literals.name: Execution Approach
x-enumeration-literals.description:
*Campaign Procedure – work steps/milestones, messages, value proposition, selling points
*Chanel Usage (email, social media, direct mail, events, etc.)
*Content/Media Development – design creative assets including embedded ‘calls to action’
*Compliance Assurance – including data privacy requirements and ethical practices

x-enumeration-literals.name: Support Capabilities
x-enumeration-literals.description:
*Content/Media Creation – inventory for deployment
*Systems Deployment – e.g. resource/finance admin, analysis and reporting systems,

x-enumeration-literals.name: Engagement Model
x-enumeration-literals.description:
*Resource Plan - organization, budget, consumables & systems 
*Performance Reporting – tracking, analysis & reporting requirements
